name: Simulation
description: Realistic systems management and life/world simulation with emergent gameplay

mechanics.coreLoop: Build and manage complex systems → Make strategic decisions → Observe emergent behaviors → Optimize efficiency → Expand and grow → Face new challenges at scale
playerActions: Set policies and rules for the simulation
Respond to random events and disasters
Experiment with different approaches and systems

mechanics: Population or city growth unlocks new buildings
Accumulate wealth to afford larger projects

failConditions: Generally forgiving - can usually recover from mistakes

resourceSystems.name: Money/Budget
resourceSystems.mechanics: Income from taxes/business, spent on construction and maintenance

resourceSystems.name: Population/Citizens
resourceSystems.mechanics: People move in/out based on conditions, drive demand for services

resourceSystems.name: Resources (Power/Water/Goods)
resourceSystems.mechanics: Must be produced and distributed to meet population needs

resourceSystems.name: Land/Space
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited buildable area requires strategic planning

setting.era: Contemporary, historical, or futuristic depending on simulation type
setting.location: City, farm, business, household, or entire civilization
setting.worldType: Realistic simulation of systems and human behavior

protagonist.background: Mayor, manager, god-like overseer, or ordinary person living simulated life
protagonist.motivation: Build thriving community, achieve prosperity, create perfect world, live desired lifestyle
abilities: Ability to pause time and plan
Control over major decisions and policies

conflict.primary: Balancing competing needs and limited resources to create sustainable, thriving system

worldRules.physics: Realistic simulation of real-world systems and economics
worldRules.magic: No magic - pure systems simulation and strategy
worldRules.technology: Modern or futuristic technology for infrastructure and services

targetAudience: Players who enjoy creative freedom and strategic planning
